purpose: Small, semantics-first backlog for transitioning to a SaaS-like multi-page layout.
principles: Keep behavior stable while changing layout and ownership boundaries.
Prioritize decision clarity over feature density per screen.

work_items.title: Introduce app shell with left navigation
work_items.outcome: Persistent left nav + top bar + route content area.

work_items.title: Split dashboard monolith into route-focused pages
work_items.outcome: Overview/Operations/Controls/Publisher Runs routes with clear ownership.

work_items.title: Extract data-fetch hooks per domain
work_items.outcome: Independent hooks for logs, controls, trend, and competitor data.

work_items.title: Define design tokens and shared primitives
work_items.outcome: Consistent spacing, typography, and action states across pages.

work_items.title: Add route-level acceptance checks
work_items.outcome: Each page has explicit data, action, and fallback expectations.
